name: paraweb-js
description: TypeScript library of ten parallel programming patterns for Node.js Worker Threads, browser Web Workers, and WebGPU compute shaders.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test:functional
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/test/testScan.js && node dist/test/testScanShared.js && node dist/test/testFilter.js && node dist/test/testFilterShared.js && node dist/test/testMap.js && node dist/test/testMapShared.js && node dist/test/testMapReduce.js && node dist/test/testMapReduceShared.js && node dist/test/testReduce.js && node dist/test/testReduceShared.js && node dist/test/testScatter.js && node dist/test/testScatterShared.js && node dist/test/testStencil.js && node dist/test/testStencilShared.js && node dist/test/testFarm.js && node dist/test/testFarmShared.js && node dist/test/testDivideAndConquer.js && node dist/test/testDivideAndConquerShared.js && node dist/test/testPipeline.js && node dist/test/testPipelineShared.js
scripts.test:functional: npm run build && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScan.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScanShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFilter.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFilterShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMap.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMapShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMapReduce.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMapReduceShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testReduce.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testReduceShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScatter.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScatterShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testStencil.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testStencilShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFarm.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFarmShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testDivideAndConquer.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testDivideAndConquerShared.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testPipeline.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testPipelineShared.js
scripts.test:benchmark: npm run build && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testScan.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testScanShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testFilter.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testFilterShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testMap.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testMapShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testMapReduce.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testMapReduceShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testReduce.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testReduceShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testScatter.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testScatterShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testStencil.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testStencilShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testFarm.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testFarmShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testDivideAndConquer.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testDivideAndConquerShared.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testPipeline.js && TEST_MODE=benchmark node dist/test/testPipelineShared.js
scripts.test:mp:functional: npm run build && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScan.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFilter.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMap.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testMapReduce.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testReduce.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testScatter.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testStencil.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testFarm.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testDivideAndConquer.js && TEST_MODE=functional node dist/test/testPipeline.js
